title: Rich Buttery Syrian Onion Flatbread
description: A buttery and chewy Syrian dish featuring caramelized onions, perfect for a snack or light meal. This flatbread is folded and filled with raw-friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add the warm water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a large circle.
Brush the melted butter over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Spread the caramelized onions over the butter, making sure to stay within the border.
Fold the dough in half over the onions, and then fold it in half again to form a triangle.
Brush the olive oil over the top of the flatbread.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until it is golden brown.
